mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log(username, operation, method, params, time, ip, create_time, module, type) VALUES (#{username}, #{operation}, #{method}, #{params}, #{time}, #{ip}, #{createTime}, #{module}, #{type})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM operation_log ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM operation_log
AND username LIKE concat('%', #{username}, '%') AND module LIKE concat('%', #{module}, '%') AND type = #{type}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM operation_log WHERE id IN
#{id}
